info.title: Polinode API
info.description: Polinode API enables programmatic creation, retrieval, update and deletion of networks and employee data. Includes network and node metrics for Enterprise users. Supports surveys and custom fields.

get.description: Retrieve all networks for the authenticated user. NetworkJSON is excluded from the response.

post.description: Create a new network.

200.description: Network created. NetworkJSON is not included in the response.

get.description: Retrieve a specific network by ID, including networkJSON.

put.description: Edit a previously created network. NetworkJSON is not included in the response.

post.description: Modularity measures the degree to which a network is divided into non-overlapping communities. Returns a value between -1 and 1.
Measures the length of the longest shortest path across the network.
Average of all shortest paths between all pairs of nodes in the network.
Average number of edges that a node's neighbors have.

200.description: Metric computed and returned or saved to network

post.description: Measures how much a node is a bridge between other nodes in the network.
Measures how close a node is to all other nodes in the network.
Measures how well-connected a node is to other well-connected nodes.
Variant of closeness centrality that handles disconnected graphs.
Measures influence of a node based on total number of walks.
Compute PageRank centrality for nodes in the network.
Compute HITS (Hyperlink-Induced Topic Search) hub and authority scores.
Compute degree (in, out, or total) for nodes in the network.
Detect communities using the Louvain method for modularity optimization.
Measure Burt's structural hole constraint for nodes.
Measures how often an edge lies on the shortest path between pairs of nodes.
Initiate an export of survey data. May take up to 10 minutes for large surveys.

get.description: Retrieve the download URL for an initiated survey export. URL valid for 5 minutes.
List all employees. Paginated with max 1000 per page. Enterprise/Partner only.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of employees to return (max 1000).

post.description: Create a new employee record. Enterprise/Partner only.

get.description: Retrieve a specific employee by ID.
List all custom field definitions. Enterprise/Partner only.

post.description: Define a new custom field for employees.
Compute Gould-Fernandez brokerage metrics for nodes.

attributes.description: Key-value attribute pairs. 'name' is used as the label.

url.description: URL for an image to render inside the node.

networkId.description: ID of the network. Provide either networkId or networkJSON.

metricEdgeWeights.description: If true, use edge weight; if string, use that edge attribute as weight.

key.description: Unique key. Must start with a letter (alphanumeric + underscore).

options.description: Valid values for enum type fields.

BasicAuth.description: HTTP Basic Access Authentication. Public Key as username, Private Key as password.
